title: Corrective fix for B0069-review: Review Add collapsible sections in Details panel
description:
Blocked reason: The collapsible detail-panel implementation regresses keyboard scrolling: runtime scroll offsets change, but the rendered `VerticalScroll` viewport does not move, so long expanded section content is inaccessible.

Remaining work: Implementation follow-up is required in the TUI detail scroll logic. The scroll bounds need to be computed from the rendered detail container state rather than the legacy flattened text representation, and regression coverage should assert actual `VerticalScroll` movement or reachable expanded content.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B0069-review.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.

handoff_summary.completed: Updated `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py` so detail scroll bounds track the rendered detail container state, including scroll resync after collapsible section changes. Added a regression test in `tests/test_tui.py` that verifies keyboard scrolling moves the real `VerticalScroll` viewport for expanded sections. Documented the rendered-bounds behavior in `README.md`.
handoff_summary.remaining: Parent bead B0069-review can be retried against this branch; the corrective scroll regression is addressed in the TUI detail panel path.
handoff_summary.risks: Validation was limited to targeted `unittest` coverage for the affected TUI detail-scroll scenarios. Broader TUI regression coverage was not rerun in this pass.
handoff_summary.next_action: Retry B0069-review and rerun the review path against the updated TUI detail scroll implementation.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: This bead changed shared detail-panel scroll and collapsible-sync logic in `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py` plus nearby regression coverage in `tests/test_tui.py`; downstream TUI work touching the same panel state/scroll paths should rebase carefully.

conflict_risks: This bead changed shared detail-panel scroll and collapsible-sync logic in `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py` plus nearby regression coverage in `tests/test_tui.py`; downstream TUI work touching the same panel state/scroll paths should rebase carefully.

execution_history.summary: Corrected TUI detail scrolling to clamp against the rendered `VerticalScroll` content height instead of the legacy flattened text body, added regression coverage for actual widget movement, and documented the behavior.

guardrails.template_text:
# Developer Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Implement only the assigned bead inside the existing architecture and file scope.

Allowed actions:
- Modify code, configuration, or local docs required to complete the assigned bead.
- Create sub-beads for discovered follow-up work that should be handled separately.
- Run targeted validation needed to confirm the implementation.

Disallowed actions:
- Redesign unrelated architecture or broaden scope beyond the assigned bead.
- Perform final review signoff in place of a review agent.
- Silently absorb unrelated test, documentation, or planning work that should be handed off.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON with concise implementation summary.
- Accurate touched files, changed files, risks, and follow-up handoff fields.
